meanings.definition: continue in existence after (an adversity, etc.)
examples: He survived the cancer against all odds

meanings.definition: succeed in a big way; get to the top
examples: After he published his book, he had arrived
I don't know whether I can make it in science!
You will go far, my boy!

meanings.definition: go successfully through a test or a selection process
examples: She passed the new Jersey Bar Exam and can practice law now
